goals.title: Verify llm-wiki information collection
goals.objective: Prove that llm-wiki can validate an OKF bundle and retrieve bounded context through both CLI/service code and the host-exposed MCP tools.

successCriteria.scenario: go test ./internal/mcp ./internal/querypack ./internal/snapshots and go run CLI validate/query-pack against fixtures
Call current Codex llm-wiki MCP tools against fixtures/querypack-graph and confirm validation plus context-only retrieval
successCriteria.cleanupReceipt: no runtime spawned directly by MCP tool calls

successCriteria.scenario: Run daemon-backed stdio proxy in isolated state, then stop daemon and verify cleanup
successCriteria.cleanupReceipt: daemon stopped and temporary state directory removed

goals.title: Audit knowledge-base llm-wiki vault
goals.objective: Verify that /Users/habin/workspace/knowledge-base/llm-wiki satisfies the OKF contract and is suitable for llm-wiki retrieval.

successCriteria.scenario: Run llm-wiki validate, lint, graph, and query-pack against the entire configured vault.
successCriteria.cleanupReceipt: read-only CLI audit; no runtime spawned

successCriteria.scenario: Scan all vault files for non-Markdown files, path-shape drift, missing frontmatter/type/title, empty bodies, provenance gaps, and root-index link coverage.
Call live llm-wiki MCP validate, lint, and query-pack tools against the default vault.
successCriteria.cleanupReceipt: no runtime spawned directly by MCP tool calls
